summary: ensure-memory-fresh helper (auto-rebuild narrative index) + onboard-brand orchestrator stage-before-ask propagation rule.
notes: Safe overlay. Pure additive changes. No schema change, no new hook, no existing behavior modified for operator. Session-search results now always fresh by design.

changes.note: Helper that compares mtime of indexed sources vs .phantom/memory.db and rebuilds iff stale. --check for read-only freshness probe, --quiet for silent runs. Cheap in fresh case.
Step 0 rewritten to invoke ensure-memory-fresh.py in one line instead of prose mtime-check instructions. Agent cannot skip freshness path.
Step 2 adds explicit rule: subagent delegated to snapshot-brand must stage-before-ask. If a gated write is blocked, surface the block to operator — do not retry autonomously.
